source_pr.title: *: Rename variable GlobalTemporaryTables in TxnCtx to TemporaryTables
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: ref #24169

Problem Summary:

Considering local temporary table，it's betweer to rename `TxnCtx.GlobalTemporaryTables`  to `TxnCtx.TemporaryTables` because local temporary tables also use it to record some information in transaction such as `GetModified`

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: [xxx](url) <!-- REMOVE this line if not applicable -->

What's Changed:

Just rename `GlobalTemporaryTables` to `TemporaryTables`

### Related changes

- N/A

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

Side effects

- N/A

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note
